actions.command: sh -c '[[ $SWAYNC_TOGGLE_STATE == true ]] && nmcli radio wifi on || nmcli radio wifi off'
actions.update-command: sh -c '[[ $(nmcli radio wifi) == "enabled" ]] && echo true || echo false'

actions.command: powerprofilesctl set performance && notify-send 'Core' 'Performance Mode Active'
actions.update-command: sh -c '[[ $(powerprofilesctl get) == "performance" ]] && echo true || echo false'

actions.command: powerprofilesctl set balanced && notify-send 'Core' 'Balanced Mode Engaged'
actions.update-command: sh -c '[[ $(powerprofilesctl get) == "balanced" ]] && echo true || echo false'

actions.command: powerprofilesctl set power-saver && notify-send 'Core' 'Power Saver Engaged'
actions.update-command: sh -c '[[ $(powerprofilesctl get) == "power-saver" ]] && echo true || echo false'

actions.command: sh -c '[[ $SWAYNC_TOGGLE_STATE == true ]] && rfkill unblock bluetooth || rfkill block bluetooth'
actions.update-command: sh -c 'rfkill list bluetooth | grep -q "Soft blocked: no" && echo true || echo false'
